3.reason: 数组大小应为大于等于n+1，当前大小10在n=10时访问mark[10]越界

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  数组大小应为大于等于n+1，当前大小10在n=10时访问mark[10]越界
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Array size insufficient; should be at least 11 to allow indices 1..10.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Array size is insufficient for N=10; accessing index 10 causes out-of-bounds. Should be at least 11.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Array size is too small. When N=10, accessing mark[10] causes out-of-bounds access. It should be at least 11.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Array size is too small; for N up to 10, indices 1..10 are used, requiring size at least 11]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Array size is too small; for N up to 10, indices 1..10 are used, so size should be at least 11.
